member.name: T:Backend.Events.Hubs.GameHub
member.summary: SignalR Hub used as the WebSocket endpoint for client connections. Clients connect here and receive game state events pushed by the server.

member.name: P:Backend.Models.Digimons.Technique.Element
member.summary: Fire, Water, Ice, Wind, Thunder, Dark, Machine, None, etc.

member.name: P:Backend.Models.Digimons.Technique.ElementStrength
member.summary: Numeric elemental power multiplier used by the game (16, 32, 48, 64, 72...)

member.name: P:Backend.Models.Digimons.Technique.LearnLevel
member.summary: Level required to learn this technique for the associated Digivolution

member.name: P:Backend.Models.Digimons.Technique.IsSignature
member.summary: True if this is the Signature technique (highest LearnLevel in the set)

member.name: P:Backend.Models.Quests.QuestStep.Prerequisites
member.summary: Optional informational prerequisites for this step. Displayed as a checklist inside the step — does NOT block progress.

member.name: P:Backend.Models.Quests.QuestStep.BitMask
member.summary:
Bitmask to check against the byte at Address. Step is completed if (byte AND BitMask) != 0.
For cumulative flags: use a single bit (e.g., "0x04" for bit 2). For rotating/phase flags: use multiple bits (e.g., "0xE0" for bits 5+6+7, meaning "step is done if ANY of these bits is set").
If null, uses legacy behavior: byte == 1 means completed.

member.name: P:Backend.Models.Quests.Requisite.ItemKey
member.summary: Optional key to automatically check if this prerequisite is met. Maps to an entry in ConsumableItemsAddresses, ImportantItemsAddresses, or an equipment ID. When null, IsDone must be set manually.

member.name: P:Backend.Models.Quests.Requisite.ItemType
member.summary: Type of item to check: "consumable", "equipment", or "important". Used together with ItemKey to determine which address table to query.

member.name: T:Backend.Services.DebugMonitorBackgroundService
member.summary: Hosted background service that runs the AppMonitor loop alongside the WebApplication host, using the idiomatic ASP.NET Core pattern.

member.name: M:Backend.Services.DebugMonitorBackgroundService.#ctor(Backend.Diagnostics.DebugMonitor)
member.summary: Hosted background service that runs the AppMonitor loop alongside the WebApplication host, using the idiomatic ASP.NET Core pattern.

member.name: M:Backend.Utils.TextDecoder.Decode(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decodes a raw byte buffer from the game's custom character encoding into a string. Byte 0x01 is treated as a space character (the game uses 0x01 0x01 for one space). Decoding stops at 0x00 or 0xFF terminators. After decoding, consecutive spaces are collapsed and the result is trimmed. Returns empty string if the result contains non-printable or invalid characters (e.g. during battle when the buffer is repurposed for other UI text).

member.name: M:Backend.Utils.TextDecoder.DecodeName(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decodes a player/character name from the game's custom encoding. Same decoding as Decode(), but without the strict area-name validation, allowing digits and special characters (e.g., "Ta01.?-~").

member.name: M:Backend.Utils.TextDecoder.IsValidAreaName(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the string looks like a valid map area name (only contains ASCII letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes).

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
